'''jawuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squandermania|squandermania]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squandermania|squandermania]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jawuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæwihith|jæwihith]] || [[word:jæwihij|jæwihij]] || [[word:jæwihish|jæwihish]] || [[word:jæwihi|jæwihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jawuwuhuth|jawuwuhuth]] || [[word:jawuwuhuj|jawuwuhuj]] || [[word:jawuwuhush|jawuwuhush]] || [[word:jawuwuhu|jawuwuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jawuhuth|jawuhuth]] || [[word:jawuhuj|jawuhuj]] || [[word:jawuhush|jawuhush]] || [[word:jawuhu|jawuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jawufhufth|jawufhufth]] || [[word:jawufhufj|jawufhufj]] || [[word:jawufhufsh|jawufhufsh]] || [[word:jawufhuf|jawufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jawuhuthu|jawuhuthu]] || [[word:jawuhuju|jawuhuju]] || [[word:jawuhushu|jawuhushu]] || [[word:jawuhuku|jawuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jawuhuth|jawuhuth]] || [[word:jawuhuj|jawuhuj]] || [[word:jawuhush|jawuhush]] || [[word:jawuhu|jawuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jawuhuthul|jawuhuthul]] || [[word:jawuhujul|jawuhujul]] || [[word:jawuhushul|jawuhushul]] || [[word:jawuhukul|jawuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jawuhuuthuthu|jawuhuuthuthu]] || [[word:jawuhuujuju|jawuhuujuju]] || [[word:jawuhuushushu|jawuhuushushu]] || [[word:jawuhuuku|jawuhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jawuhuthun|jawuhuthun]] || [[word:jawuhujun|jawuhujun]] || [[word:jawuhushun|jawuhushun]] || [[word:jawuhukun|jawuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jawuhuthuoro|jawuhuthuoro]] || [[word:jawuhujuoro|jawuhujuoro]] || [[word:jawuhushuoro|jawuhushuoro]] || [[word:jawuhukuoro|jawuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
